title: BudgetTopUp v1
description: Monotonic budget top-up request for an existing campaign. At least one field must be provided. All fields must be non-negative. Note: If a dimension was originally unbounded (e.g., omitted in the effective envelope or treated as infinite by an implementation), applying a top-up to that dimension is undefined; implementations SHOULD treat it as a no-op or reject with schema_validation_failed to avoid silent semantic changes.
